header.announcement: Daily worker hiring for factories, workshops, contractors and growing businesses

footer.description: A company hiring website for stitching karighar, embroidery workers, electricians, printer workers, machine setup staff, contractor workers and other daily-basis workforce needs.

hero.title: Find Skilled Workers. Hire Faster. Grow Your Business.
hero.subtitle: ScaleVyapar helps businesses across India find the right blue and grey-collar workers quickly and reliably. Post your requirements, reach verified workers, and build a stronger workforce.
hero.imageBadgeSubtitle: Verified workers, faster hiring and better workforce visibility.

pricing.title: Company pricing

pricing.footnote: Displayed plans below are connected to live active company plans from the worker database.

items.quote: ScaleVyapar has made hiring easier for our business. We get good quality workers every time.
items.name: Rohit Sharma

items.quote: We posted a job and received verified and fit profiles within hours. Highly efficient.
items.name: Vijay Agarwal

items.quote: The best platform to quickly find reliable manpower for our projects and seasonal needs.
items.name: Neena Khan

items.question: Can I post requirements for more than one worker category?
items.answer: Yes. A company can select multiple categories and create multiple worker requirements from the same flow.

items.question: Can pricing and plan validity be changed later?
items.answer: Yes. Company plans are controlled from the worker admin panel and can be updated there.

items.question: Will my requirement go live immediately?
items.answer: The current flow creates a pending company with a draft job post so your admin team can review and activate it.

finalCta.title: Post Your Requirement & Hire Trusted Workers
finalCta.subtitle: Join hundreds of companies across India building better teams every day.

intake.title: Post company requirement
intake.description: Submit your company and first job requirement in one go. The worker admin team can review, approve and publish it from the admin panel.

workerCta.title: Looking for Work?
workerCta.description: Create your profile and get hired by top companies looking for skilled workers.

hero.title: India’s Trusted Platform Connecting Companies with Verified Workers
hero.subtitle: ScaleVyapar is built to make worker hiring simple, fast, and reliable for businesses across industries. We connect companies with skilled and verified workers who are actively looking for opportunities.
bulletPoints: No Useless Data — Only Active & Relevant Profiles
hero.floatingCardTitle: Building a Better Hiring Experience for Everyone

missionCards.title: Our Mission
missionCards.description: To empower businesses by providing access to a pool of verified, skilled, and active workers quickly and efficiently.

missionCards.title: Our Vision
missionCards.description: To become India’s most trusted and efficient worker hiring marketplace, creating growth opportunities for both companies and workers.

missionCards.title: Our Promise
missionCards.description: We are committed to transparency, data accuracy, and delivering only active and relevant worker profiles.

pricingPage.title: Choose the right company plan for your hiring volume and urgency.
pricingPage.subtitle: Clear pricing, short validity windows and category-specific options inspired by employer pricing pages, but tailored for worker exchange workflows.
pricingPage.customPlanDescription: Use a personalised plan if you hire across many categories or cities and want additional admin support.

signinPage.title: Sign in to manage your company profile, plans and worker requirements.
signinPage.subtitle: Keep this page simple for employers. Use it as a branded login page with clear actions for existing customers and new enquiries.
signinPage.infoTitle: What you can do after sign in
signinPage.infoDescription: View active plans, manage requirements, follow job status and connect with the admin team.
benefits: Review plan validity and payment status
Track city and category hiring activity
Connect with support for activation and follow-up

contactPage.subtitle: Use this page for support, sales follow-up, activation help and pricing discussions.

cards.description: Use the contact team for account activation, plan follow-up and company profile changes.
